title: lithocarpus echinotholus
intro: Lithocarpus echinotholus, also known as the Bur Oak Acorn, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Fagaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus echinotholus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
